Dashboard

​​Access the Data about Adventure Works and check these features that the Agent has

Balance Sheet Generation

A balance sheet with current assets, long term assets, current liabilities, and long term liabilities can be generated for any time period.

Budget Vs Actuals Report Generation

​Check the budget for various quarters or larger time periods and compare with actual spending per department. Generate reports that specifies the variance and flags departments that overspend.​

Prompt any report about AdventureWorks 

Get a summarized view of information based on date, product, etc. Prompt for internet sales data, reseller sales, product performance and analysis, customer summaries, and check what is in the inventory. Automatically query an SQL server with natural language and there is no need to think about the schema of the database as the agent will perform all the joins and get the results directly.
